issues.description: Target scope is 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but effect text says 'Return...to the owner's hand' — should target own Characters, not opponent's. Scope should be 'ChooseOwnCharacter'.
Target scope is 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but effect text says 'Return...to the owner's hand' — should target own Characters, not opponent's. Scope should be 'ChooseOwnCharacter'.
